question: WHERE do i PLACE MYSELF ON THE LANE?
content:
Most of the time, the best answer is actually where not to play.
 You want to avoid parts of the lane where you can’t miss without getting punished.
 Choose a spot where:
 
 there is friction outside your target,
 there is more oil inside your target,
 and you have some room to miss without losing the pocket.
 
 Stay away from "penalty zones", areas that hook too early or never hook at all.
 Pay attention to what the other bowlers are doing, because their shots will change the lane, especially around the breakpoint (carrydown) and the front of the lane (transition).
 If you can keep friction outside and oil inside, your ball will react predictably and you’ll stay in control.
